channel.title: Multi-User on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Multi-User on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Per-user states for multi-user budgets in the REST API
item.description:
GitHub REST API now returns per-user progress for multi-user budgets from a single endpoint. This lets clients identify users nearing their limits without making separate requests.

  • Source: GitHub
